name: Storeroom, can't get here
description: I'm in a Storeroom, can't get here
hints: This is an internal storeroom used by the game engine. You cannot reach it during normal play.
Items and actions defined here affect global game state (pump, find, transmit).
Not a playable room. The game engine uses this for global action processing.
notes: Internal game engine storeroom (room 0). Not reachable by the player. Houses global action handlers for START PUMP, FIND, and TRANSMIT commands.
